jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at Shiprocket
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Shiprocket. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Fleet Manager to strengthen our Aurangabad-based team.

About Shiprocket:
Shiprocket is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in Fleet Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Shiprocket!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
